name: linkedin-post-from-blog
description: Create a brief and engaging LinkedIn post that promotes the blog post currently in context.
---

# LinkedIn Post From Blog

Create a LinkedIn post promoting the blog post in context.

## Instructions

1. Build the blog post URL using:
   - Base URL: `https://harrybin.github.io`
   - Post slug from the blog post in context
2. Write a brief, engaging post.
3. Highlight the key points of the blog post.
4. Encourage readers to check it out.
5. Use emojis.
6. Do not use dashes for sentence parts.
7. Do not put colons before an "and".

## Output

Return only the final LinkedIn post text.
